name: jarvis-voice-automation
description: Unified JARVIS workspace for voice-driven Copilot automation

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && npm run electron
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && electron-builder build --publish never
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run build && electron-builder build --mac --publish never
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && electron-builder build --win --publish never
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run build && electron-builder build --linux --publish never
scripts.electron:build:all: npm run build && electron-builder build --mac --win --linux --publish never
scripts.electron:pack: npm run build && npm run backend:rebuild:electron && electron-builder --dir --publish never
scripts.electron:pack:local: npm run build && npm run backend:rebuild:electron && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir --publish never --config.mac.identity=null

extendInfo.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: JARVIS needs speech recognition access to transcribe your voice commands.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: JARVIS needs microphone access to listen for your voice commands.
extendInfo.NSAudioCaptureUsageDescription: JARVIS needs audio capture access to process your voice commands.
